title: carpesium nepalense var. pedunculosa
intro: Carpesium nepalense var. pedunculosa is a variant of the Carpesium nepalense plant, a species of flowering plant in the aster family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Carpesium nepalense var. pedunculosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and leaves are used in traditional medicine to create various remedies, including ointments and poultices.
